properties.mapping_note: composite — represents full Excalidraw scene; no single DomainAttribute target
properties.name: Scene
properties.description: The full Excalidraw scene object (elements + appState) being edited.

properties.name: Board Name
properties.description: Name of the board file currently loaded into the canvas.

properties.name: Selected Project Id
properties.description: Id of the project to activate.

properties.name: Project Display Name
properties.description: Human-readable project name shown in the picker rows.

properties.name: Snapshot List
properties.description: Read-only list of past snapshots for the active board.

properties.name: Selected Snapshot Timestamp
properties.description: Timestamp string of the snapshot the analyst selected for diff/restore.

properties.mapping_note: enum-ref — maps to ENUM-RENDER-MD-SUBTYPE, not a scalar DomainAttribute
properties.name: Render Subtype
properties.description: One of entity | uc | form | domain-model | uc-index | traceability.

properties.name: Related Entity/UC/Form Id
properties.description: Optional id of the related node when the subtype targets a single entity/uc/form.
